steps.title: Identify what needs describing
steps.content: The student must describe the format of the poem 15 haiku (for Toni Morrison)—its structural composition.

steps.title: Match the format description to the choice
steps.content: C directly names the format: a sequence of fifteen haiku. The others don't describe format—they broaden scope to the entire book (A), explain Sanchez's reasoning for the form (B), or focus on publication and theme (D). That matches choice C — C is correct.
